top_signals.title: US Marine Corps turns to AI-powered Bullfrog as drone threats expand
top_signals.summary: Allen Control Systems announced Monday that the Marine Corps has chosen the Bullfrog autonomous weapon system to integrate into its airborne defenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anemoi Gets Wind in its Sails with Latest Bureau Veritas Certification
top_signals.summary: Anemoi Marine Technologies has secured design assessment certificates from Bureau Veritas covering several versions of its Rotor Sail wind-assisted propulsion technology, expanding third-party certification of its product range.The approvals…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
